title: Sign in and reach tenant dashboard
description: Verifies an existing user can sign in with valid credentials and lands on the dashboard with tenant metrics/modules/usage displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify tenant metrics, active modules, and usage summaries are displayed

title: View dashboard tenant summary
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see key tenant metrics, active modules, and usage summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify key tenant metrics are displayed
Verify active modules and usage summaries are displayed

title: Complete onboarding to create an organization and reach dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete onboarding by providing organization name, industry, and plan and is redirected to the dashboard afterwards.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill in the organization name field with Test Organization
Select a valid industry
Select a plan option
Submit the onboarding form to create the organization
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify tenant metrics, active modules, and usage summaries are displayed

title: Review current plan and confirm upgrade intent
description: Verifies an authenticated user can review their current plan on Billing, preview a different plan, confirm upgrade intent, and reach an upgrade confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the billing page
Select a different plan option to preview changes
Confirm the upgrade intent
Verify an upgrade confirmation screen is displayed

title: View current plan details and quota limits
description: Verifies an authenticated user can view the current plan and see quota limits and usage summary on the Billing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the billing page
Verify the current plan information is displayed
Verify quota limits and usage summary are displayed

title: Switch tenant context from the dashboard
description: Verifies an authorized multi-tenant user can switch the active tenant using the tenant selector and the dashboard refreshes to reflect the selected tenant context.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Open the tenant selector
Select a different tenant from the list
Verify the dashboard tenant context updates to the selected tenant
Verify tenant metrics, active modules, and usage summaries refresh for the selected tenant

title: Expand quota details to see per-module limits and usage
description: Verifies an authenticated user can expand quota details on Billing and see per-module limits and usage information.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the billing page
Open quota details
Verify per-module quota limits are displayed
Verify per-module usage information is displayed

title: Switch plan previews without committing changes
description: Verifies an authenticated user can switch between plan preview options on Billing and the displayed preview updates without entering an upgrade confirmation flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the billing page
Select a different plan option to preview changes
Select another plan option to preview changes
Verify the plan preview reflects the most recently selected plan

title: Deny access for incorrect password
description: Verifies a user entering a correct email with an incorrect password is denied access and sees an access-denied error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify an access denied error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Require organization name during onboarding
description: Verifies onboarding blocks submission when organization name is blank and shows a required-field validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Leave the organization name field blank
Select a valid industry
Select a plan option
Submit the onboarding form to create the organization
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for organization name
Verify the user remains on the onboarding page

title: Reject invalid email format on login
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission with an invalid email format and shows an inline email validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with invalid email format
Fill in the password field with any value
Submit the login form
Verify an inline email validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Plan preview shows no-change state when selecting the current plan
description: Verifies that selecting the current plan in the plan preview results in a no-change state rather than presenting an upgrade intent confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open the billing page
Select the current plan in the plan preview options
Verify a no-change state is displayed for the plan preview
Verify the upgrade intent confirmation control is not available
